On this page

Donate ​

AI Image Renamer is a free, open-source plugin developed and maintained by Kolja Nolte.

If this plugin has saved you time or improved your workflow, consider supporting its continued development with a donation. Every contribution — no matter how small — helps keep the project alive and growing.

How to Donate ​

You can donate via PayPal:

👉 Donate via PayPal

Other Ways to Support ​

Not in a position to donate? You can still help:

  • ⭐ Leave a review on WordPress.org
  • 🐛 Report bugs on GitHub
  • 📣 Spread the word — share the plugin with fellow WordPress users
  • 💻 Contribute code via pull requests

Thank you for your support! 🙏
